title: damrongia cyanea
intro: Damrongia cyanea, also known as the Thai bitters or Andaman bitter, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia, particularly in Thailand and Myanmar, known for its bitter taste and medicinal properties. The plant is used to treat various health issues, including fever, diarrhea, and digestive problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Damrongia cyanea include its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve nausea, and reduce fever, making it a popular remedy in traditional medicine. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, where its bitter compounds are extracted and combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
